title: GeneralDEEB's Enderite Mod
description: Adds a new material found in the End called Enderite
body:
![Mod Title Saying "ENDERITE MOD"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b91411493269fab938b5d703d181d60e8f9aa0cd.png)

This mod adds a successor to Netherite, Enderite. This includes Enderite tools and armor, blocks and items.

### Features
- Enderite Tools. (Mines quicker than Netherite).
- Enderite Weapons. (Does more damage than Netherite).
- Enderite Armor. (Higher protection value than Netherite. Currently untrimmable).
- Enderite Ore. (Drops Raw Enderite. Found rarely in the End).
- Ender Diamond Ore. (The same as Nether Gold Ore, but for diamonds. Found commonly in the End).
- Diamond Nuggets. (Dropped by Ender Diamond Ore).
- Raw Enderite. (Dropped by Enderite Ore).
- Unrefined Enderite Ingot. (Obtained by smelting Raw Enderite).
- Enderite Ingot. (Crafted with four Unrefined Enderite Ingots and four Diamonds).
- Enderite Smithing Template. (Used to upgrade Netherite Equipment to Enderite. Found in End Citys).
- Raw Enderite Block. (Crafted with nine Raw Enderite).
- Unrefined Enderite Block. (Crafted with nine Unrefined Enderite Ingots).
- Enderite Block. (Crafted with nine Enderite Ingots).
